title: VR EasySens
description: Experience Minecraft like never before with our VR modpack for Fabric 1.20.1, featuring the Vivecraft mod! Full VR support for HTC Vive, Oculus Rift, Valve Index, and more. Realistic interactions with real hand movements.
body:
# Minecraft VR ModPack "EasySens"

![VR](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd6da82af440c2ae3c566c4d079ae21bcc34225e.png)

---
Immerse yourself in the world of Minecraft like never before with our exclusive mod pack that supports virtual reality! This set includes all the necessary mods for a fully immersive VR experience.

**Features:**

- **Full VR Support:** Enjoy Minecraft in virtual reality with the Vivecraft mod, which provides support for various VR devices such as HTC Vive, Oculus Rift, Valve Index, and more.
- **Realistic Interactions:** Break blocks, fight mobs, and build your worlds using real hand movements. Feel the scale of blocks and objects in the game like never before.
- **Multiplayer:** Play with friends in VR and see their movements in real-time. Supports LAN and server multiplayer games.
- **Optimization and Performance:** Includes the Optifine mod for enhanced performance and shader support, making your gaming experience even more immersive.
- **Compatibility with Other Mods:** Supports Fabric and Forge platforms for maximum compatibility with other mods and extensions.

**Requirements:**

- **Minecraft Java Edition:** Ensure you have the Java Edition of Minecraft installed.
- **VR Device:** Various VR devices are supported, including HTC Vive, Oculus Rift, Valve Index, and more.

Dive into the world of Minecraft with new depth and realism. Order our VR-supported mod pack today and start your adventure in virtual reality!
